emails.subject: Advisory Agreement per Gary Hickerson
emails.body: Cheryl and Sara. I need someone to take a read through of this document which engages Psytech for services. Thanks Sheila Forwarded by Sheila Glover/HOU/ECT on 02/13/2001 11:07 AM "Mark Sagel" <msagel@home.com> on 02/13/2001 10:16:43 AM

emails.subject: Advisory Agreement per Gary Hickerson
emails.body: Cheryl. Where are we on this agreement for consulting services? The services will be charged to the Rate Currency group. Thanks. Sheila Forwarded by Sheila Glover/HOU/ECT on 02/23/2001 06:29 PM From: Sheila Glover 02/13/2001 11:09 AM

emails.subject: Re: Advisory Agreement per Gary Hickerson
emails.body: Re: Advisory Agreement per Gary Hickerson Sheila, as per our conversation on Friday, I was out sick from the 15th through the 22nd therefore I was not able to turn back to my review of this Agreement until today. I completed the review this morning and have sent the comments to my assistant to type. Therefore, we should have comments to forward by the end of the day today. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3880D (713) 345-4693 Sheila Glover@ECT 02/23/2001 06:32 PM
